name: Russia
description: Russia is home to world-leading universities in science, engineering, and medicine. Scholarships through the Russian Government Scholarship program make it a highly accessible option.

tuitionFees.undergraduate: Tuition fees in Russia are relatively low compared to Western countries, making it an economical choice for students.
tuitionFees.phd: $2,000–$5,000 per year; Russian Government Scholarships available

requirements: Student visa application at Russian embassy
Migration card on arrival (keep throughout stay)

workPermit.postStudy: Temporary work permit available for qualified graduates
workPermit.notes: Low tuition and cost of living; Russian Government Scholarships widely available

languageRequirements.notes: Russian language proficiency for Russian-taught programs; English programs available

topUniversities.name: UNIVERSITY, COURSE, INTAKE AND ENTRY REQUIREMENT
Bachelor's degree with minimum 55% from a recognized university + Online Interview

faqs.question: Is it easy to get a student visa for Russia?
faqs.answer: With proper documentation and financial proof, obtaining a student visa for Russia is straightforward. MVR Consultants can guide you through the entire process.

faqs.question: What are the tuition fees in Russia?
faqs.answer: Tuition fees vary by university and program. Contact our counselors for program-specific fee structures.

faqs.question: Can I work while studying?
faqs.answer: Most countries allow international students to work part-time during term time. Specific hours and conditions depend on the country's immigration rules.

faqs.question: Are there scholarships available for Indian students?
faqs.answer: Yes, many universities and governments offer merit-based and need-based scholarships for international students. Ask our counselors for scholarship matching.
